chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No. S – 32 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 29.01.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Panhwar, Advocate for appellant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After arguing at some length, learned Counsel for appellant, having agreed on the proposition that he would file a summary suit against the respondent / accused on the basis of a cheque issued by him, does not press this acquittal appeal. Learned Additional Prosecutor General has no objection to this proposal. Accordingly, this acquittal appeal is disposed of as not pressed, in above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
